title: key.rs verify: magic 155 for TPM_RC_SIGNATURE
description: In wolftpm/src/key.rs line 200, the verify() match arm uses the literal 155 to detect TPM_RC_SIGNATURE (the 'not verified' case). This is a bare integer with only a comment documenting its meaning. If wolfTPM redefines or reorders the constant, the match silently routes valid signatures to Ok(false) or unverified ones to Err. Should use the named bindgen constant (e.g. wolftpm_sys::TPM_RC_T_TPM_RC_SIGNATURE) instead.
